title: GovKit Stack Overlay Schema
description: Schema for cli/stacks/<id>/overlay.yaml - the metadata file shipped alongside stack-specific architecture docs. Loaded by cli/overlay.py.

id.description: Overlay id (e.g. 'python-fastapi'). Must match the parent directory name.

version.description: Overlay version bumped when the docs change in a way that warrants user re-review. Doctor's D006 compares this against the baseline header in installed docs.

display_name.description: Human-readable stack name shown by `govkit stack list`.

summary.description: One-line description of the stack's tooling. Surfaces alongside display_name in `govkit stack list`.

supported_types.description: Project types (`--type` values) this stack overlay applies to. Consulted by stack selection so an inferred stack that doesn't fit the requested type falls back to the type default instead of overriding it.

default_assumptions.description: Assumptions the overlay declares by default. Each is materialized into the marker's assumptions[] at apply time.

docs.description: Files the overlay copies into the target. `src` is relative to the overlay dir; `dest` is relative to the target.

skill_context.description: Stack facts merged into .govkit/skill_context.yaml under `stack` for skill consumers. Keys vary per stack (language, api_framework, unit_test, bdd_test, package_files, source_folder_hint, ...).

review_checklist.description: Per-overlay items appended to the team's review checklist by `govkit calibrate`.
